title: Rename device - close/open the Settings screen
scenario: Renamed device name does not persist after closing and reopening the Settings screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap on the connected device to open Device Settings
Tap the device's official name field
Enter a new name for the device
Tap Done to save the new name
Close the Settings screen (e.g., navigate back or exit the app)
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap on the same device to open Device Settings
expected: The new device name entered in step 5 is still displayed in the device name field.
